creator: gonzo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Greg V from comment #20)

Hi Greg,

Yes, you're right, VID/PID is not a strict requirement for U2F but Chromium uses its chrome.uhid API (https://developer.chrome.com/apps/hid) for platform-specific access to UHID devices. For U2F implementation it's not critical but I'd prefer to have fully functional API. Still, looks like it can't be helped.
